features.feature: Improve the logo, make it look like a Spider. Our brand name is "Weaver"

improvements.description:
I'll modify the logo SVG in index.html to create a spider-themed design while maintaining the 'Weaver' brand name, and update the CSS to support the new design with smaller, targeted changes.
⚠ SIZE_VIOLATIONS:
  • Step 1 (wwwroot/index.html): oldString is 11 lines / 896 chars — max is 5 lines / 250 chars. Split into multiple steps, each targeting only the lines that actually change.
  • Step 2 (wwwroot/styles.css): oldString is 13 lines / 316 chars — max is 5 lines / 250 chars. Split into multiple steps, each targeting only the lines that actually change.
  • Step 2 (wwwroot/styles.css): only ~6 chars actually differ but oldString wraps 316 chars of surrounding context. Shrink oldString to just the changed region.
  • Step 3 (wwwroot/styles.css): oldString is 6 lines / 106 chars — max is 5 lines / 250 chars. Split into multiple steps, each targeting only the lines that actually change.
